mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.category_id FROM hot_deal_products hdp INNER JOIN product_options po ON po.id = hdp.product_option_id INNER JOIN products p ON p.id = po.product_id WHERE hdp.hot_deal_id = #{hotDealId} ORDER BY p.category_id

SELECT h.id AS hotDealId, h.title, h.description, ( SELECT LISTAGG(DISTINCT c.name, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY c.name) FROM hot_deal_products hdp INNER JOIN product_options po ON po.id = hdp.product_option_id INNER JOIN products p ON p.id = po.product_id INNER JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE hdp.hot_deal_id = h.id ) AS categoryNames FROM hot_deals h WHERE h.id = #{hotDealId} AND h.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT p.name AS productName, hdp.original_price AS originalPrice, hdp.hot_deal_price AS hotDealPrice FROM hot_deal_products hdp INNER JOIN product_options po ON po.id = hdp.product_option_id INNER JOIN products p ON p.id = po.product_id WHERE hdp.hot_deal_id = #{hotDealId} ORDER BY p.name, hdp.product_option_id
